testcase.name: test_legacy_slots_endpoint_should_enforce_50_floor

failure.message: AssertionError: [BUG] /api/slots/spin accepts bet_amount=10 (floor is 10 not 50). status=500 body=Internal Server Error assert 500 in (400, 422)

testcase.failure: tests/test_casino_50coin_floor_audit_may2026.py:98: in test_legacy_slots_endpoint_should_enforce_50_floor assert sc in (400, 422), ( E AssertionError: [BUG] /api/slots/spin accepts bet_amount=10 (floor is 10 not 50). status=500 body=Internal Server Error E assert 500 in (400, 422)

testcase.name: test_baccarat_should_enforce_50_floor

failure.message: AssertionError: [BUG] /api/baccarat/play accepts bet_amount=10. status=200 body={"game_id":"baccarat_12f1c4837e7c","player_hand":[{"value":"9","suit":"spades"},{"value":"Q","suit":"hearts"}],"banker_hand":[{"value":"J","suit":"diamonds"},{"value":"Q","suit":"diamonds"}],"player_s assert 200 in (400, 422)

testcase.failure: tests/test_casino_50coin_floor_audit_may2026.py:108: in test_baccarat_should_enforce_50_floor assert sc in (400, 422), ( E AssertionError: [BUG] /api/baccarat/play accepts bet_amount=10. status=200 body={"game_id":"baccarat_12f1c4837e7c","player_hand":[{"value":"9","suit":"spades"},{"value":"Q","suit":"hearts"}],"banker_hand":[{"value":"J","suit":"diamonds"},{"value":"Q","suit":"diamonds"}],"player_s E assert 200 in (400, 422)

testcase.name: test_vibes_slots_should_enforce_50_floor

failure.message: AssertionError: [BUG] /api/games/vibes-slots/spin accepts stake=10 (gt=0 only). status=200 body={"reels":["seven","joker","cherry","seven","diamond"],"stake":10.0,"matches":1,"anchor_symbol":"seven","payout_multiplier":0,"gross_payout":0.0,"jackpot_feed":0.1,"jackpot_paid":0.0,"is_jackpot_hit":f assert 200 in (400, 422)

failure.message: AssertionError: [BUG] /games/pai-gow/play accepts below-floor bet (gt=0 only). status=200 body={"player_high":14,"dealer_high":12,"outcome":"win","gross":9.5,"tax":1.2825,"net":8.2175,"player_hand":[{"rank":"4","suit":"S"},{"rank":"9","suit":"D"},{"rank":"6","suit":"C"},{"rank":"8","suit":"D"}, assert 200 in (400, 422)
